generated_from: docs/设计/PDF_语义翻译回填_执行契约.md (§2 六段研判流水线, 七产物依赖链)
docs/设计/PDF_语义翻译回填_状态机与工具编排设计.md (v0.4 §7.19.1 必须新增或补齐的产物)
_meta.note: This file is the machine-readable form of the six-stage judgement pipeline (execution contract §2). Each artifact is a gate: it lists produced_by (which stage/tool writes it), depends_on (which upstream artifact must exist first), and blocks_if_missing (which downstream stage is forbidden when it is absent). The graph validator uses depends_on to prove there is no orphan stage and no downstream stage without its upstream artifact. IMPORTANT: today only a flat quality_signals.json exists in core; artifacts marked exists_in_core=false are the gap that makes Codex output unreadable (problems never bucketed by domain). pipeline_order is authoritative; a stage may run only after every artifact in its depends_on chain is present.

pipeline_stages.allowed_judgement: 证据是否充分、信号属于哪个原始 gate、归入哪个 problem_domain
按 10 个 problem_domain 聚合、标每域阻塞数、标上下游因果关系
只选一个主 failure_class、定 severity、列 deferred_failures、判是否需补证
查静态注册表把 failure_class 映到 repair_family + 目标状态 + 允许 operation 类型
在已选 repair_family 的参数口内绑定 operation；operation_count>0 才算数
按 problem_domain 对比修前/修后，出 接受/回滚/继续/失败
forbidden: 只看目标指标忽略硬负面
把被拒候选当最终 PDF

artifacts.blocks_if_missing: 无证据 → 运行契约失败 (S_FAIL_PROCESS_CONTRACT)
artifacts.anti_overfit: 只能引用当前 run 证据；禁止人工对照 PDF、样本页码、固定文本

artifacts.replaces_flat: quality_signals.json (round24 里是 {group_signals:1411, overlap_signals:70} 的扁平结构)
artifacts.anti_overfit: 每条信号必须反引 producer_tool + source_json_path + threshold_or_rule；不许只写“失败”

artifacts.blocks_if_missing: 无桶 → 禁止选主问题
artifacts.anti_overfit: domain 必须来自 problem_domains.json 的 10 个固定域，不许临时造域
selected_failure_class 必须来自 failure_classes.json；不许出现工具名/参数
repair_family 必须来自 repair_families.json；表外病种 → 无可用修复能力

artifacts.blocks_if_missing: 无补丁 → 禁止改布局/重生成候选
artifacts.noop_rule: operation_count=0 是 no-op，必须记 skipped_noop_repairs 并换下一个非 no-op atom
artifacts.anti_overfit: operations 只能引用当前 run 的 group_id/bbox/font/fit 状态；禁止文件名/页码/固定坐标/固定文本

artifacts.blocks_if_missing: 无回测 → 不算“修过” → 运行契约失败
acceptance_gates: 闸门1 目标改善：selected_failure_class 修后计数 < 修前计数
闸门2 硬负面无回退：其它 problem_domain 的阻塞 hard negative 未上升
两个闸门必须同时通过才 repair_accepted=true；否则回滚
artifacts.anti_overfit: before/after 必须按 problem_domain 分列，不做平均/投票/抵消

dependency_chain: evidence_basket -> quality_signal_ledger -> problem_domain_buckets -> triage_result -> dispatch_result -> repair_patch -> repair_acceptance

loop_back_edges.condition: 目标未修好 或 硬负面回退，且预算未耗尽
loop_back_edges.rule: 回滚后同一 failure_class 不许再派同一个已失败的 repair_atom；必须换同域其它 atom 或升级 repair_family 或进 Ax_AdaptiveChange

loop_back_edges.condition: 目标修好 且 无硬负面回退 且 无剩余 deferred 阻塞
